title: Flowers Bread Route, Stillwater, OK
reasonForSelling: The owner is pursuing another business opportunity.
supportTraining: Owner and company will train. Most company routes require the buyer to form an entity (must be an INC). If you need help with this visit https://www.routesforsale.net/incorporate.html
description:
Flowers Bread Route distributorship for sale in the Stillwater, Oklahoma region for $100,000! Company related financing available with an estimated $39,000 down. In addition, a 10% cash reserve of the selling price will be required. This route is currently grossing an estimated $449,649 per year in sales and nets $68,952! Distributorship and “protected territory” are purchased through current independent distributor and contracted through Flowers Baking Co. Flowers currently distributes its well-known brands of Nature’s Own, Wonder, Sunbeam, Tasty Cake, Dave’s Killer Bread, and much more! This well-established route has 11 accounts and delivers to popular grocery stores, variety stores and restaurants. Turnkey business backed by a publicly traded company on the NYSE!

Ad#:2455537
